description: Single source of truth for agent permissions. The agent enforces these rules at runtime (emitting permission_check spans); the CottonMouth backend serves them to the governance UI. Deny-by-default: anything outside an allow rule is blocked.

ops-assistant.description: Tool-using Bedrock agent that reads/writes files, runs shell commands, and fetches URLs inside a sandboxed workspace.
ops-assistant.enforcement: CottonMouth SDK permission_check spans, evaluated before every tool call

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create or overwrite a text file

rules.description: File reads and writes must stay within the sandbox workspace.
Shell binaries the agent is permitted to execute.
Destructive or unpermitted binaries that are always blocked.
Hosts the agent is permitted to make HTTP requests to.
